response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way, sir, and I’ll show you the truth. The silver lining of this situation is that the stranger’s doubts are beginning to fade. Wrap your head around the reality—this verdict was a misfire, not a fair outcome. Let’s see if the lead can catch up with the truth."
